rationale: The cited 2003 JMR paper centers on incommensurate resources/commensurability in promotions, showing reduced relative comparison for nonmonetary premiums and reversal when value is made salient. The citing 2020 paper’s main mechanism is very similar: vouchers reduce gift-value vs product-price comparison, and the effect attenuates when gift value is made salient. This close mechanism-level overlap makes the citation likely substantive rather than a generic mention.
